renames.rationale: Calls __std_system_error_allocate_message and LocalFree with 'unknown error' fallback string; classic system_category::message() implementation
Sole caller is FUN_140002320 (CxxThrowException wrapper) and references 'bad cast' string twice; constructs std::bad_cast exception object
Calls FUN_1400022f0 (ThrowBadCast ctor) then _CxxThrowException; invoked from 5 sites doing dynamic_cast-style checks
Only callee is __std_exception_copy; matches std::exception copy-constructor thunk pattern
Calls _Locinfo_dtor and ~_Lockit; matches MSVC std::locale facet constructor scaffolding using _Lockit guard
Only callee is _guard_dispatch_icall; small CFG-guarded indirect call thunk
Calls _calloc_base and _Mbrtowc in a loop; converts a multibyte buffer to wide chars using a locale facet
Calls _Locinfo_ctor, _Lockit, _Getcvt, operator_new with 'bad locale name' xref; std::ctype facet constructor from locale name
8-instruction forwarder whose only callee is _Getwctypes; thin wrapper exposing the ctype<wchar_t> table fetch
30-insn function with sole callee _guard_dispatch_icall; size and shape match ctype<wchar_t>::do_is virtual dispatch
Twin of 1400027e0 (same size/insns/callee _guard_dispatch_icall); likely sibling ctype<wchar_t> virtual (do_scan_is/do_scan_not)
Calls _Mbrtowc; 23-insn ctype<wchar_t>::do_narrow-style routine converting a wide char via locale facet
Calls _Mbrtowc in a 48-insn loop; matches std::ctype<wchar_t>::do_narrow range-overload narrowing a wide buffer
